name: RawTxt
description: Minimal text paste service for AI workflows — paste text, get URL, feed AI

endpoints.name: create_paste
endpoints.description: Create a new text paste. Returns raw URL for AI consumption and view URL for browser.

endpoints.name: read_paste
endpoints.description: Read a paste by ID. Returns raw text content with metadata headers.

endpoints.name: list_recent
endpoints.description: List recent active pastes with metadata (no content body). Useful for browsing recent pastes.

endpoints.name: get_health
endpoints.description: Get server health status and paste statistics
